attributes.description: Physical memory usage, utilization by state, and time trends for OOM and pressure checks.
attributes.panelsJSON:
[{"type":"markdown","embeddableConfig":{"content":"## [System Host OTel] Memory

Physical memory from the host metrics receiver: how much is used, free, or inactive, and the total used ratio over time.
- Used physical bytes split by state on one trend
- Total used share as a line with adaptive buckets
- Snapshot table of mean utilization by state for the time range","hide_title":true,"settings":{"open_links_in_new_tab":true}},"panelIndex":"8d48c52c-6cd7-41db-b432-41db95bbfa38","gridData":{"x":0,"y":0,"w":16,"h":8,"i":"8d48c52c-6cd7-41db-b432-41db95bbfa38"}},{"type":"vis","embeddableConfig":{"title":"mem u","hide_title":true,"attributes":{"visualizationType":"lnsMetric","title":"","references":[],"state":{"datasourceStates":{"textBased":{"layers":{"layer_0":{"index":"metrics-hostmetricsreceiver.otel-*-37b645a0d55ca02ca08626d4949b6e9036ac47e4860512a823905305f04c576a","query":{"esql":"TS metrics-hostmetricsreceiver.otel-*
